inquirer_contact.name: Alex Reyes
inquirer_contact.background: health journalist, The Meridian Health Desk

reveal_rules.cue: Reporter opens asking MI to comment on Dermelia's cancer warning and presses for a quotable yes/no on causation.
reveal_rules.detail_withheld: none — the reveal is behavioral: whether the trainee avoids becoming an unauthorized spokesperson and avoids causation statements
reveal_rules.surfaces_when: not applicable — this is a behavioral compliance test, not an information-reveal

common_failures.description: Gives a substantive comment / confirms or denies causation
Reads an SRL to the reporter as an official statement
Doesn't capture outlet/contact or notify Communications
